title: AnyFortune
description: Allows you to fortune any block!
body:
![AnyFortune](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0e9db1a144e0b7a4e9294893d1cdeaf781b1a4f4.png)

This plugin allows you to fortune any block!
### Features:
- Customizable messages to send you!
- Changable list of blocks that will be fortuned
- List of blocks that will be smelted
- List of blocks that won't be autopickedup/smelted
- AutoPickUp that supports custom fortune and smelted blocks!
